title: Duplicate records due to webhook retries
symptom: When the same webhook event is received multiple times, duplicate records are created in the database. This leads to unintended duplicate actions downstream.
not_this_if: Database already has unique constraints in place
root_cause: The webhook-triggered workflow processes events without tracking previously processed events, leading to duplicate entries when the same event is received multiple times due to retries from the external service.
fix_steps: Create a database table with a UNIQUE constraint on event_id.
Insert the event_id and payload into the database using an INSERT statement with ON CONFLICT to handle duplicates.
agent_instruction: Implement a database table with a UNIQUE constraint on event_id to prevent duplicate processing.
